routines.title: Quiet Hour
routines.description: No screens. Everyone reads, paints, draws, or just sits. This is our most protected ritual.

routines.title: Friday Movie Night
routines.description: Kids choose by turn. Popcorn mandatory.

routines.title: Sunday Pancake Breakfast
routines.description: Everyone helps. The kids set the table. No rushing.

routines.title: Bedtime Stories — Lo
routines.description: Lo picks two books. Always two.
